Off Calendar Jun-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jill Toups' Request for OSC re: contempt denied. Order to compel production of documents granted. Defendant Ransom shall produce all documents described in Plaintiff's original subpoena within 10 days of the date of this order. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $750.00 to run against defendant Ransom. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT

Off Calendar Jan-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RANSOM PROPERTY COMPANY, INC. AND CHRISTOPHER RANSON, JR. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.
APPEARANCES: Russell Davis, Esq. (415) 409-5627 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party; Martin Putnam, Esq. (510) 444-5082 Law Office of Peter Stanwyck for Defendant and Moving Party.
Ruling: Argued and the court granted the motion for judgment on the pleadings with leave to amend with the exception of the first cause of action Violation of Cal. Fin. Code 4970 which is withdrawn. Prevailing party to prepare order and comply with CRC 391. At plaintiff's request, plaintiff's motion for leave to amend first amended complaint set for 2/3/05 is taken off calendar. (302/REQ/HE) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647
